tests.description: Canonical parse succeeds for an already normalized VERS.
Parsing fails when ASCII whitespace is present.
tests.expected_failure_reason: non-canonical VERS: whitespace is not permitted

tests.description: Parsing fails when constraints start with a pipe.
tests.expected_failure_reason: non-canonical VERS: leading pipe is not permitted

tests.description: Parsing fails when constraints end with a pipe.
tests.expected_failure_reason: non-canonical VERS: trailing pipe is not permitted

tests.description: Parsing fails when constraints contain consecutive pipes.
tests.expected_failure_reason: non-canonical VERS: consecutive pipes are not permitted

tests.description: Parsing fails when constraints are not in canonical order.
tests.expected_failure_reason: non-canonical VERS: constraints are not sorted by version

tests.description: Parsing decodes canonical percent-encoding once for versions.
Parsing fails when version percent-encoding is invalid.
tests.expected_failure_reason: non-canonical VERS: invalid percent-encoding in version
